title: Core AgentSkill provider registry
goal: Add a small registry for module-owned AI skills, following existing source adapter and right panel provider patterns.
requirements: Define AgentSkillDescriptor or equivalent dataclass with id, name, description, source_code, object_types, required_tools and trigger_examples.
Define AgentSkillProvider protocol with catalog_entry(), load_body() and optional is_available_for_user().
Add register_agent_skill(), unregister_agent_skill(), get_agent_skill() and registered_agent_skills().
Validate skill ids with a strict stable identifier pattern.
Reject duplicate ids unless replace=True is explicitly passed.
Do not import domain modules in apps.core.
acceptance: Registration, duplicate rejection, replacement and unregister behavior are unit-tested.
apps.core remains independent of workorders and waiting_list.
